description: RDM fidelities from 4 hardware W-state runs on ibm_fez
reconstruction_method: lstsq reconstruction with eigenvalue clipping (linear inversion)
note: Random-arm values are volatile across random draws; the manuscript table reports values from the original analysis random draw, which differ from the recomputed values using the w_repeat_results random arm (seed=42). K* values are deterministic and agree.
